name: maxtac-android
description: Android application and platform research workflows, including user-facing input loops, for MaxTAC.

interface.shortDescription: Android APK, input loop, device, and runtime research.
interface.longDescription: MaxTAC for Android adds APK and DEX reverse engineering with JADX, Android surface triage, user-facing Android input loops, ADB/logcat/JDWP/Frida runtime evidence workflows, and Android-focused auditor routing.
defaultPrompt: Use MaxTAC for Android to triage this authorized Android target.
Use MaxTAC for Android to run a user-facing input loop for this APK.
Use MaxTAC for Android to inspect this APK and choose auditors.
